vote.question: On the Cloture Motion
vote.title: Motion to Invoke Cloture: Daniel E. Burrows to be an Assistant Attorney General

vote.question: On the Nomination
vote.title: Confirmation: Justin R. Olson, of Indiana, to be U.S. District Judge for the Southern District of Indiana

vote.question: On the Cloture Motion
vote.title: Motion to Invoke Cloture: Justin R. Olson to be U.S. District Judge for the Southern District of Indiana

vote.question: On the Nomination
vote.title: Confirmation: Brian Charles Lea, of Tennessee, to be U.S. District Judge for the Western District of Tennessee

vote.question: On the Cloture Motion
vote.title: Motion to Invoke Cloture: Brian Charles Lea to be U.S. District Judge for the Western District of Tennessee

vote.question: On the Nomination
vote.title: Confirmation: Megan Blair Benton, of Missouri, to be U.S. District Judge for the Western District of Missouri

vote.question: On the Cloture Motion
vote.title: Motion to Invoke Cloture: Megan Blair Benton to be U.S. District Judge for the Western District of Missouri

vote.question: On the Nomination
vote.title: Confirmation: Aaron Christian Peterson, of Alaska, to be United States District Judge for the District of Alaska

vote.question: On the Cloture Motion
vote.title: Motion to Invoke Cloture: Aaron Christian Peterson to be U.S. District Judge for the District of Alaska

vote.question: On the Nomination
vote.title: Confirmation: Nicholas Jon Ganjei, of Texas, to be U.S. District Judge for the Southern District of Texas

vote.question: On the Cloture Motion
vote.title: Motion to Invoke Cloture: Nicholas Jon Ganjei to be U.S. District Judge for the Southern District of Texas

vote.question: On the Nomination
vote.title: Confirmation: David Clay Fowlkes, of Arkansas, to be U.S. District Judge for the Western District of Arkansas

vote.question: On the Cloture Motion
vote.title: Motion to Invoke Cloture: David Clay Fowlkes to be United States District Judge for the Western District of Arkansas

vote.question: On Passage of the Bill
vote.title: H.R. 7148, as Amended; A bill making further consolidated appropriations for the fiscal year ending September 30, 2026, and for other purposes.

vote.question: On the Motion S.Amdt. 4287
vote.title: Motion to Waive All Applicable Budgetary Discipline Re: Merkley Amdt. No. 4287; To prevent the deferral or rescission of appropriations within 90 days of their expiration.

vote.question: On the Amendment S.Amdt. 4290
vote.title: Sanders Amdt. No. 4290; To rescind certain amounts appropriated for U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement and certain changes to Medicaid.

vote.question: On the Motion to Table S.Amdt. 4286
vote.title: Motion to Table Lee Amdt. No. 4286; To eliminate funding for the United States African Development Foundation.

vote.question: On the Motion to Table S.Amdt. 4234
vote.title: Motion to Table Lee Amdt. No. 4234; To strike the earmark for the Community and Training Center by the New Immigrant Community Empowerment.

vote.question: On the Motion to Table S.Amdt. 4236
vote.title: Motion to Table Lee Amdt. No. 4236; To strike all earmarks.

vote.question: On the Amendment S.Amdt. 4272
vote.title: Paul Amdt. No. 4272; To eliminate funding for refugee and entrant assistance.

vote.question: On Cloture on the Motion to Proceed
vote.title: Motion to Invoke Cloture: Motion to Proceed to H.R. 7148; A bill making further consolidated appropriations for the fiscal year ending September 30, 2026, and for other purposes.

vote.question: On Cloture on the Motion to Proceed
vote.title: Motion to Invoke Cloture on the Motion to Proceed to S. 3627; A bill to require institutions of higher education to disseminate information on the rights of, and accommodations and resources for, pregnant students, and for other purposes.

vote.question: On Passage of the Bill
vote.title: H.R. 6938; A bill making consolidated appropriations for the fiscal year ending September 30, 2026, and for other purposes.

vote.question: On the Cloture Motion
vote.title: Motion to Invoke Cloture: H.R. 6938; A bill making consolidated appropriations for the fiscal year ending September 30, 2026, and for other purposes.

vote.question: On the Point of Order
vote.title: Is the Point of Order Well Taken Re: To the Privilege Status of S.J. Res. 98 ; A joint resolution to direct the removal of United States Armed Forces from hostilities within or against Venezuela that have not been authorized by Congress.

vote.question: On the Motion to Proceed
vote.title: Motion to Proceed to S.J. Res. 84; A joint resolution providing for congressional disapproval under chapter 8 of title 5, United States Code, of the rule submitted by the Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services relating to "Patient Protection and Affordable Care Act; Marketplace Integrity and Affordability".

vote.question: On Cloture on the Motion to Proceed
vote.title: Motion to Invoke Cloture: Motion to Proceed to H.R. 6938; A bill making consolidated appropriations for the fiscal year ending September 30, 2026, and for other purposes.

vote.question: On the Nomination
vote.title: Confirmation: Alexander C. Van Hook, of Louisiana, to be U.S. District Judge for the Western District of Louisiana

vote.question: On the Motion to Discharge
vote.title: Motion to Discharge S.J.Res. 98; A joint resolution to direct the removal of United States Armed Forces from hostilities within or against Venezuela that have not been authorized by Congress.

vote.question: On the Motion to Proceed
vote.title: Motion to Proceed to S.J.Res. 86; A joint resolution providing for congressional disapproval under chapter 8 of title 5, United States Code, of the rule submitted by the Environmental Protection Agency relating to "Air Plan Approval; South Dakota; Regional Haze Plan for the Second Implementation Period".

vote.question: On the Nomination
vote.title: Confirmation: Sara Bailey, of Texas, to be Director of National Drug Control Policy

vote.question: On the Nomination
vote.title: Confirmation: Joshua Simmons, of Virginia, to be General Counsel of the Central Intelligence Agency

vote.question: On the Nomination
vote.title: Confirmation: Keith Bass, of Texas, to be an Assistant Secretary of Defense
